title:
Designing a
Conversational AI
for an XM Platform
description: How we embedded a natural-language AI assistant across every module of a SaaS Experience Management Platform — supporting text, speech, and file inputs — translating plain English into live API actions, reducing task time by 60%, and putting the power of data analysts in every user's hands.
ndaNote: Specific metrics and screen visuals withheld under NDA. Full context available on request.
